data.name: Step-Sister's Pussy 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Step-Sister's Pussy🔞– an adult visual novel that will immerse you in family intrigues and unpredictable antics. Get ready to delve into the complex relationships of a family where each character hides their secrets and dreams.



The return of the main character home, after being expelled from college, forces him to confront unexpected challenges and problems. Feel the reaction of the stepmother and neighbor to the return of the main character – one rejoices, while the other had different plans. Follow how family relationships intertwine as the main character begins to work under the parents' roof, and each family member has their own ambitions and secrets.



Meet Amanda – the smart but very audacious sister who aims to escape from the family by excelling in her studies. You will also encounter Emma, who passionately loves weed and couldn't care less about anything else, always ready to get intimate with the main character while under the influence. And when the father returns, with his conscience whitened by alcohol, new opportunities and threats arise for the entire family.

Step-Sister's Pussy🔞 is a game that embarks on a quest for truth in complex relationships and allows you to immerse yourself in a world where each character has their motives and fights for their interests. Prepare for unpredictable twists and incredible adventures in this captivating adult visual novel.

Special Features:
  • Witness the development of an exciting plot where real emotions will not leave you indifferent

  • Variety of Endings: Every decision you make affects the course of the story and the final outcome. The game offers many alternative endings, making each of your choices significant.

  • Open-minded Erotic Art: Step-Sister's Pussy🔞 invites you on an aesthetic journey where you can enjoy a variety of erotic arts and beautiful sexual scenes created by talented artists.

  • Dynamic Soundtrack: Enjoy an engaging soundtrack that enhances the game's atmosphere and makes each scene even more captivating and tense.

  • Fast-paced and Intuitive Gameplay: No waiting around – Step-Sister's Pussy🔞 offers fast-paced and exciting actions that are easy to grasp, allowing you to fully enjoy the game without unnecessary obstacles.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
